title: nestegis collina
intro: Nestegis collina, also known as the New Zealand native hawthorn, is a shrub-like plant native to the Pacific Islands, including New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The leaves and berries of the Nestegis collina plant have been used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which have been shown to have health benefits including reducing cholesterol levels and improving overall heart health. In traditional Maori medicine, the plant is used to treat a range of conditions, including high blood pressure, heart problems, and digestive issues.
